bmilkc.name: Brahmi Milk Chocolate
bmilkc.description: A creamy milk chocolate infused with Brahmi (Bacopa monnieri), the revered Ayurvedic herb known for enhancing memory, focus, and cognitive clarity.

bdarkc.name: Brahmi Dark Chocolate
bdarkc.description: An intense dark chocolate enriched with Brahmi extract, combining the antioxidant power of dark cocoa with the cognitive benefits of Ayurveda.

amilkc.name: Ashwagandha Milk Chocolate
amilkc.description: Silky milk chocolate blended with Ashwagandha Atibaladi — the ancient stress-buster root that brings calm, resilience, and balance to modern life.

adarkc.name: Ashwagandha Dark Chocolate
adarkc.description: Bold dark chocolate meets the adaptogenic might of Ashwagandha. A sophisticated bar designed for those who seek calm without compromise.

cmilkc.name: Chyawanaprash Milk Chocolate
cmilkc.description: The legendary Chyawanaprash formula — 40+ herbs — reimagined in a luxurious milk chocolate. Immunity meets indulgence in every square.

cdarkc.name: Chyawanaprash Dark Chocolate
cdarkc.description: A powerful union of the Chyawanaprash complex and rich dark chocolate. The deepest expression of Ayurvedic wellness through artisanal chocolate.

balm.name: Jatyadi Balm
balm.description: Traditional Ayurvedic balm for skin repair and protection.

shots.name: Mushtarishta Shots
shots.description: Herbal shots for strength and recovery.
